text: costs should add up from bottomt to top
description:
so aims have "intrinsic cost". 
When A has to supporting aims B and C. A has intrinsic cost 5 A: 3 B: 2 then A has actual cost 5 + 3 + 2 = 10. 
By the way: if an aim supports multiple parent aims, it's costs get added on each path (not splitted).
